en.title: For Starlink Mini Charger 60W Replacement Power Supply AC Adapter 30V 2A Output Wall Charger Plug for Starlink Mini Dish
en.description_html:
• Designed for Mini - The Starlink Mini charger is specifically crafted for the Starlink Mini power adapter, ensuring a perfect fit and optimal performance. Seamlessly integrated for precise compatibility, it provides the device with the power it needs to maximize its performance, making it an ideal spare or replacement for uninterrupted connectivity

  • Fast Charging - The Starlink Mini power supply delivers 60W high-speed charging and a stable 30V/2A output, ensuring safe and reliable operation of your equipment and eliminating any issues related to insufficient power

  • Safe and Reliable - The charger block features multiple layers of reliable safety protection, including anti-short circuit, anti-overload, anti-overheating, and anti-overvoltage functions, ensuring safe and efficient use. It protects your Starlink Mini and other equipment

  • Input Compatibility - The wall charger block supports a wide input range of 100-240V, 50/60Hz, and 1.6A, making it suitable for both home and outdoor use. It ensures efficient performance and an enhanced travel exploration experience.

  • Portable Design - The DC power supply features a lightweight and compact design, made from durable material, making it easy to carry. Its robust construction ensures reliable performance during long-distance travel and indoor use
